description_long: This kiosk features a modern, modular design with smooth, rounded edges and a predominantly metallic exterior accented by deep blue trim. The front area includes a counter with two stools, a digital display, and a printed sign with text, suggesting a customer-facing service function. A potted plant adds a touch of greenery near the entrance, while the side and rear panels are solid, providing privacy and security. The roof is flat with slightly curved corners, and the structure appears to be constructed from metal panels with some plastic or composite elements. The interior is partially visible, showing a small workspace and seating area. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as plazas, sidewalks, or parks.
description: A sleek, modern kiosk with metallic panels, blue accents, a front counter, digital signage, and a flat roof with rounded corners.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main counter, digital display, printed sign, two stools, and a potted plant near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid blue-accented panel, partial view of the counter, and the plant at the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid metallic back panel and the kiosk's overall rectangular shape with rounded roof edges.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the flat roof, side panel, and partial visibility of the interior workspace and seating.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and digital display; printed sign on side panel with visible text, digital display above counter.
attribute_door_configuration: Single door, standard swing type, located at the front.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with rounded corners, metallic finish, no visible overhangs or skylights.
